notes:
Archetype stage: leveling
Leveling Boneshatter Slayer setup focused on early campaign progression.
Applied changes:
- Set class=Duelist ascendancy=Slayer
- Set level=28
- Renamed tree to Boneshatter Slayer Leveling
- Replaced main skill Boneshatter of Complex Trauma -> Boneshatter in group 4
- Set movement group 5 to: Leap Slam
- Removed Frostblink (1 occurrence(s))
- Added War Banner to group 1
- Added Blood and Sand to group 2
- Added Ancestral Protector to group 3
- Added Molten Shell to group 5
- Set config enemyLevel=28
